# 👋 Welcome to Otaku Reader Discussions!

This is your space to connect with the Otaku Reader community. Before you post, please explore the categories below and read our community guidelines.

---

## 📚 **Discussion Categories**

### 💡 **[Ideas](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader/discussions/categories/ideas)**
Have a feature request or improvement suggestion? Share it here! We review all ideas and discuss feasibility with the community.

**Before posting:**
- Search existing ideas to avoid duplicates
- Be specific about the use case
- Include mock-ups or examples if possible

---

### 🐛 **[Troubleshooting](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader/discussions/categories/troubleshooting)**
Running into issues with Otaku Reader? This is the place to get help from the community and maintainers.

**When posting:**
- Include your device model & Android version
- Describe the steps to reproduce
- Share relevant error logs (if available)
- Try the latest version first

---

### 💬 **[General Discussion](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader/discussions/categories/general)**
Off-topic conversations, manga recommendations, feature discussions, and community vibes.

---

### 🔧 **[Q&A](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader/discussions/categories/q&a)**
Quick questions about how to use Otaku Reader, API questions for extension developers, and more.

---

### 📢 **[Announcements](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader/discussions/categories/announcements)**
Major updates, releases, and important news from the team. Subscribe to stay in the loop!

---

## 🌟 **What Makes Otaku Reader Special**

- **🔒 Privacy First** — All data stays on your device. No accounts, no tracking, no AI.
- **📚 Manga Only** — Focused, lightweight, built to work.
- **⚡ Fast & Smooth** — Jetpack Compose-native with optimized webtoon scrolling.
- **🔌 Extension System** — Compatible with 2000+ Tachiyomi sources.
- **📊 Advanced Stats** — Reading streaks, goals, heatmaps, and shareable stats cards.
- **🎨 Dynamic Themes** — Per-manga color schemes extracted from cover art.

**👉 [Full Feature List](https://github.com/Heartless-Veteran/Otaku-Reader#-features)**

## 📋 **Community Guidelines**

### ✅ Do's:
- Be respectful and inclusive
- Search before posting to avoid duplicates
- Provide detailed information when asking for help
- Share knowledge and help other users
- Give constructive feedback

### ❌ Don'ts:
- Spam, advertising, or self-promotion (except in General Discussion)
- Piracy links or illegal content
- Harassment or discrimination
- Cross-posting the same question to multiple categories
- Sharing personal information

---

## 🤖 **About This Repository**

**Otaku Reader** is a **manga-only Android app** built from the ground up with:

- ✅ **100% Jetpack Compose UI** — No XML layouts
- ✅ **Clean Architecture** — Feature-based modules
- ✅ **Extension System** — Tachiyomi/Komikku compatible sources
- ✅ **Tracker Integration** — AniList, MyAnimeList, Kitsu, MangaUpdates, Shikimori
- ✅ **Advanced Reader** — Paged, webtoon, continuous scroll, dual-page, smart panels
- ✅ **Local Backup** — Human-readable JSON backup/restore, no cloud

**Status:** 🚧 **Phase 5: Pre-Release Audit (In Progress)**
- Extension system functional
- All core features complete
- Certification pending

---

**Happy reading! 📚✨**
